Riyara SINGLE WINDOW

Riyara Trading

Building Materials

7 cement brands. All grades. One authorised distributor. Now on LinkedIn. Zuari Cement (Heidelberg Materials, Germany) Maha Cement HD+ (My Home Industries) Sagar Cement Priya Cement Nagarjuna Cement (NCL Industries) Chettinad Cement UltraTech Cement (Aditya Birla Group) All grades available — OPC 43, OPC 53, PPC, Slag Cement. Bulk and packed delivery across Tamil Nadu. Riyara Trading has been the authorised distribution channel for these brands since 2014. One call gets you any brand, any grade, delivered on schedule. This page is where we’ll share the brands we’re proud to distribute, what makes reliable distribution work, and insights from 11 years in the business. Follow along. #RiyaraTrading #NowOnLinkedIn #CementDealer #CementDistributor #TamilNadu #AuthorisedDistributor #ZuariCement #MahaCement #SagarCement #PriyaCement #NagarjunaCement #ChettinadCement #UltraTechCement

Chettinad Cement ALL GRADES ALWAYS

Riyara Trading

Building Materials

Chettinad Cement has been building South India since 1962. Three generations of manufacturing leadership. Riyara doesn’t just carry Chettinad. We stock every Chettinad grade — OPC 43, OPC 53, PPC. Not just the popular ones. All of them. Always. Because the project that needs Chettinad PPC at 6 AM shouldn’t hear “we only have OPC 53 right now.” Bulk and packed. Across Tamil Nadu. Riyara Trading

Building Materials

Riyara PROPER DOCUMENTATION

Riyara Trading

Building Materials

Size = diameter. Grade = strength. Fe415: Good ductility. Residential. Fe500: Most commonly specified. Balanced. Fe550: Maximum strength. Heavy infrastructure. All from TATA, VSP, SAIL. Distributed by Riyara in Tamil Nadu. Every delivery comes with proper documentation: GST invoice, mill test certificate, delivery challan. Post 3 Apr 3 Thu · Founder Introduction
Riyara SINGLE WINDOW + ZERO TOLERANCE + DEDICATED AM
SU

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

Cement manufacturers make excellent products. That’s their expertise. Our expertise is different. We make sure that product reaches your project — right brand, right grade, right quantity, right time. One call to Riyara gets you access to 7 major brands, all grades, delivered on a zero-tolerance schedule. Your dedicated account manager handles everything. Manufacturers create the product. We ensure it reaches you without interruption. Since 2014. #CementDistribution #TamilNadu #ReliableDistribution

Riyara DEDICATED ACCOUNT MANAGER
SU

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

When you call Riyara, you don’t explain your requirements to a new person each time. Your dedicated account manager knows your project. Knows your grades. Knows your schedule. Knows your site access timings. It sounds simple. But it’s the reason clients stay for years. In cement distribution, relationships aren’t built on price. They’re built on someone who picks up your call and already knows what you need. #Distribution #AccountManagement #Business

Post 12 Apr 17 Thu · Business Insight
Riyara AUTHORISED NOT GREY
SU

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

In Tamil Nadu’s cement market, not every dealer is authorised by the manufacturer. Grey market cement exists. It’s cheaper. But there’s no traceability. No guarantee on sourcing. No manufacturer backing if something goes wrong. Riyara is an authorised agent for every brand we carry. That means: → Direct sourcing from the manufacturer → Full documentation trail → Manufacturer-backed quality assurance It costs us more to operate this way. But your project deserves certainty, not savings on paper. #AuthorisedDistributor #QualityAssurance #CementIndustry
LikeCommentRepost
Post 17 Apr 24 Thu · Business Insight
Riyara PROPER DOCUMENTATION
SU

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

You’d be surprised how many cement deliveries happen without proper documentation. “We’ll send the invoice later.” “The weighbridge was closed.” “Just check the quantity at site.” At Riyara, every delivery comes with: → GST invoice → Weighbridge slip → Delivery challan Every time. No exceptions. Because your accounts team and audit trail deserve the same reliability as your cement supply. #Documentation #Compliance #CementDistribution

Post 3 Jun 4 Wed · Education
Riyara ALL GRADES + GRADE SELECTION
SU

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

OPC 43: Everyday cement. Residential. Plastering. OPC 53: High-strength. Flyovers. Bridges. RMC. PPC: Durability. Moisture resistance. Coastal structures. Slag: Specialist. Marine. Chemical resistance. No grade is “better.” Each serves a purpose. The skill is matching grade to structure. All four manufactured by the brands we distribute. All four always in stock at Riyara. #CementGrades #OPC43 #OPC53 #PPC #Construction
LikeCommentRepost
Post 11 Jun 18 Wed · Education
Riyara ZERO TOLERANCE
SU

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

0-3 months from manufacture: Full strength. 3-6 months: Slight reduction. 6+ months: Significant degradation. Retest. The manufacturers produce quality cement. Our job is to deliver it while it’s at its best. That’s why timing matters. That’s why zero tolerance isn’t just about convenience — it’s about quality. #CementQuality #ShelfLife #Construction
LikeCommentRepost
Post 17 Jun 26 Thu · Quarter Reflection
Riyara META REFLECTION
SU

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

1. People search for cement brands, not distributors. Showing up alongside them made Riyara visible. 2. The “small” USPs mattered most. Weekend delivery. Proper documentation. Consistent pricing. These aren’t flashy — but they’re why clients stay. 3. Celebrating the brands instead of competing with them built more credibility than any self-promotion could. 4. The brands are the heroes. We’re the reliable channel. And that’s enough. Q3 starts now. Monsoon season. We’ll keep showing up. #RiyaraTrading #ReliableDistribution #TamilNadu
